_meta.description: 玩家與彈珠場基礎數值（HP、球數、起始球、球超時、發射力與物理參數）。Q-007 已定案：此檔為專案標準資料檔，程式不得寫死這些值。

deprecated_fields.launch_speed_min: deprecated by Q-031 / Codex 17. Retained for schema compatibility; launch uses player.launch_speed only.
deprecated_fields.launch_speed_max: deprecated by Q-031 / Codex 17. Retained for schema compatibility; launch uses player.launch_speed only.
deprecated_fields.charge_cycle_seconds: deprecated by Q-031 / Codex 17. Player-controlled charge timing is disabled.
